logout.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to logout?

description.guest: Join our community of modern farmers. Get the latest crop insights and market trends.
description.farmer: Empowering your farming journey with real-time data and AI insights.
description.buyer: Explore the market and buy crops even before harvest. Grow your business and profit margins by empowering farmers.

hero.description: Empower your farm with Sasya-Marg. Get precise crop suggestions based on your soil and water levels to maximize your yield.

card.title: Crop Suggestions
card.subtitle: Based on your Soil & Water
card.analysis: AI analysis complete for UP West Region

featuresSection.description: Sasya-Marg combines traditional farming wisdom with cutting-edge technology to help you make profitable decisions.

aiCrop.title: AI Crop Suggestion
aiCrop.description: Our rule-based AI analyzes your soil type (Black, Alluvial) and water availability to recommend the perfect crop.

multipleFarmlands.title: Add multiple farmlands
multipleFarmlands.description: You can manage and add multiple farmlands at multiple locations and get personalized crop suggestions.

onlineMandi.title: Online Mandi
onlineMandi.description: List your crop on E-commerce to connect directly with customers without middlemen. You can even list crops before harvesting.

govtSchemes.title: Government Schemes
govtSchemes.description: Stay informed about the latest subsidies, insurance plans, and financial aid available for farmers.

work.heading: From Data to Harvest.
work.subheading: Get accurate crop suggestions in just three simple steps.

steps.title: Enter Farm Details
steps.description: Input your region, soil type (e.g., Black, Alluvial), and water availability to help us understand your land.

steps.title: AI Analysis
steps.description: Our rule-based AI cross-references your data with weather forecasts and historical crop patterns.

steps.title: Get Recommendations
steps.description: Receive a tailored list of crops with high success rates, estimated yield, and market price potential.

cta.heading: Find Your Place in the Agri-Chain.
cta.subheading: Connect directly. Whether you are growing the future or sourcing the best produce, Sasya-Marg bridges the gap.

farmer.title: I am a Farmer
farmer.description: Register your land, get AI-driven crop suggestions for the next season, and list your harvest directly for buyers to see. Increase your profits with smart decisions.

buyer.title: I am a Buyer
buyer.description: Create a wishlist of crops you need. Get notified when farmers in your desired regions are ready to harvest. Source fresh directly from the farm.

hero.description: Access our complete range of farming services. From crop suggestion to online market insights, everything you need to grow better is right here.
